in partial fulfilment of the requirement for the awa
rd of Master of Computer Application
I am using this opportunity to express my gratitude to everyone who supported me throughout the course of this

project. I am thankful for their aspiring guidance, invaluably constructive criticism and friendly advice during the project work. I am sincerely grateful to them for sharing their truthful and illuminating views on a number of issues related to the project.
Today I am very pleased as I am presenting the project
I express my warm thanks to
Firstly we would to like to thank
for giving us an opportunity. Thanks to
for her encouragement and valuable guidance.
I hereby take opportunity to regard my sincere thanks to internal guide
her kind co-operation during the project. Her efforts have been monumental in the completion of this project. She has been very generous with her advice, views,
and always ensured that I was on the right track. Taking this opportunity, would also like to thanks our
for their valuable guidance during development of my project and encouraging me.

Last but not least, I most thanks to all my friends, colleagues who helped me a lot throughout the project it is their support, cheerfulness, encouragement and helping nature with which our project might not have been completed.
Any omission in this brief acknowledgement does not meet lack of gratitude.

is a forward-thinking software development company specializing in building smart, scalable, and business-oriented digital solutions. The company focuses on empowering businesses with modern technology to streamline operations, improve efficiency, and drive growth.
With a strong commitment to innovation and quality,

Developers delivers reliable and cost-effective software solutions tailored to meet the dynamic needs of various industries such as retail, hospitality, and service sectors. The organization emphasizes performance, security, and user-friendly design in every product it develops.
, combining cutting-edge technologies with industry best practices.
We continuously evolve with emerging technologies to ensure that our solutions remain
To become a leading software solutions provider that empowers businesses with intelligent, scalable, and automated systems.
To deliver high-quality, cost-effective, and user-friendly software that enhances productivity and enables businesses to grow in a competitive digital world.
Developers stands as a reliable technology partner for businesses seeking
. With a strong focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, the company continues to build solutions that align with modern industry standards and real-world business needs.

has been developed to overcome the limitations of traditional manual systems used in educational institutions. The primary objective of this system is to digitize and streamline school operations by providing a centralized, efficient, and user-friendly platform for managing academic and administrative activities.

This application is designed to reduce manual effort, minimize errors, and improve the overall efficiency of information management. The system ensures accurate data handling by implementing validation mechanisms and secure authentication, thereby preventing unauthorized access and incorrect data entry. The intuitive interface allows users with minimal technical knowledge to operate the system effectively.

The platform facilitates the management of essential school operations such as student admissions, staff details, notices, and multimedia content through a dedicated admin panel. It enables real-time updates, ensuring that students, parents, and staff have access to the latest information. The system is built using modern web technologies, ensuring high performance, scalability, and responsiveness across devices.

Furthermore, the application supports optimized data storage and retrieval, allowing administrators to efficiently manage institutional records without complexity. By automating routine tasks and centralizing data, the system allows staff to focus more on academic and organizational growth rather than manual record-keeping.

provides a secure, reliable, and efficient digital solution that enhances communication, improves resource utilization, and supports the institution in achieving its long-term goals in a technology-driven environment.

The existing system in many educational institutions is largely manual or semi-digital, which leads to inefficiencies in managing academic and administrative activities. Maintaining records such as student admissions, staff details, notices, and other institutional data manually requires significant time, effort, and resources. It also increases the chances of human errors, data loss, and inconsistencies.

In the traditional system, information is often scattered across registers, files, or basic digital tools, making it difficult to access, update, and manage data efficiently. Communication between the institution and students or parents is not always timely, as notices and updates are not delivered in real time. Additionally, managing and updating content such as announcements, events, and gallery images becomes a repetitive and time-consuming task.
Another major challenge is the lack of a centralized platform where all school-related information can be managed and
. Administrators may need to rely on multiple processes or personnel to handle routine operations, which reduces productivity and increases operational complexity.
To overcome these limitations, there is a need for a
dynamic, secure, and user-friendly web-based system

that can automate and streamline these processes. The proposed system aims to provide a centralized platform for managing school data, improving communication, reducing manual workload, and ensuring accurate and efficient information handling.
In the existing system, most of the operations in educational institutions are carried out manually or with limited digital support. There is a high chance of
, which may lead to modification or loss of important information such as student r staff details, and notices. This can result in incorrect information handling and poor administrative decisions.
All record-keeping and updates are performed manually, which requires additional manpower and consumes a significant amount of time. The chances of
are very high, especially while maintaining large volumes of data. As a result, the system cannot guarantee accurate and consistent information at all times.

Managing files and records is also a major challenge. Data is stored in physical registers or scattered files, making it difficult to organize and retrieve information when needed. Searching for specific records becomes a

Communication in the existing system is not effective, as notices and updates are shared manually, which may not reach students and parents on time. Additionally, there is no proper system for managing digital content such as images, events, or announcements.
slow, error-prone, less secure, and inefficient
, making it unsuitable for handling modern educational requirements.

To overcome these challenges, a centralized and fully automated system is required that can efficiently manage all institutional activities. The proposed system provides a digital platform that simplifies data management, reduces manual effort, and ensures accuracy.
Centralized web-based platform for managing all school data
Secure access with authentication for administrators
Easy and real-time notice and announcement updates
Simplified admission and data entry process
️ Efficient management of gallery and multimedia content
Ability to generate and access reports anytime
Improved efficiency, reliability, and data security

The system enhances overall productivity by automating routine tasks and providing quick access to information. It ensures better communication, reduces errors, and supports the institution in adapting to modern digital requirements.

is to provide a comprehensive, web-based platform for managing and presenting school-related information in an efficient and organized manner. The system is designed to serve both administrators and users (students, parents, and visitors) by offering easy access to essential information and functionalities.
The application focuses on digitizing key academic and administrative processes, reducing manual effort, and improving communication within the institution.
Management of school information such as About Us, courses, and facilities
Online admission form handling and data storage
Staff details management through admin panel
️ Gallery management for images and events
Secure admin login and content management system
Web-based system accessible from any device (desktop/mobile)
️ Efficient database management for storing dynamic data
️ Cloud deployment for global accessibility and scalability
Secure authentication and data protection mechanisms
Administrators can manage all website content
Students and parents can access updated information anytime
After studying and analyzing the existing and required functionalities of the
, a feasibility study was conducted to evaluate the practicality of the project. It helps determine whether the proposed system can be developed successfully within available resources.
feasibility focuses on cost-effectiveness of the proposed system.
Use of open-source technologies reduces software cost
Maintenance cost is low due to scalable architecture
Reduces manual work and saves time
Benefits of the system outweigh development cost
The proposed system is economically feasible as it provides maximum benefits at minimum cost.
Technical feasibility analyzes whether the project can be developed using available technology and resources.
Modern technologies like Next.js, React, PostgreSQL, and Prisma are used
All required functionalities can be implemented
System provides security, performance, and scalability
Database and authentication integration is reliable
Future enhancements can be added easily
The project is technically feasible and can be implemented successfully.
Operational feasibility checks whether the system will work effectively for users in real-world conditions.
System is user-friendly and easy to operate
The proposed system is operationally feasible and suitable for institutional use.

Preliminary investigation involves identifying the methods used to study the existing system and collect information about current problems and requirements of the institution. It helps in understanding how the system works and what improvements are needed.
Generally, the following methods are used for collecting information:

We collected information from school authorities, teachers, and students regarding the problems faced in the existing system. Before conducting interviews, we planned the type of questions to gather relevant and useful information.
In the interview, we asked questions such as
● How do you currently manage student and staff records?
problems do you face in maintaining manual records?
are notices and updates communicated to students and parents?
● Do you find it difficult to manage admissions manually?
● Do you think a digital system will improve efficiency?
level of security do you expect from the system?
The investigation was carried out by interacting with concerned people and considering their valuable suggestions and feedback for system improvement.

We observed that managing records manually is time-consuming and prone to errors. Communication of notices is not always timely, and maintaining multiple records creates confusion. A digital system can simplify these tasks and improve efficiency.

Various records such as student details, staff records, admission forms, and notice registers were examined. These records provided useful insights into the existing system’s limitations, such as data redundancy, difficulty in retrieval, and lack of proper organization.
aims to simplify the difficulties encountered in manually handling school-related information such as student details, staff records, admissions, notices, and other administrative data.
In the manual system, managing large amounts of data is time-consuming and error-prone. The proposed system provides a
where all information can be managed efficiently. It allows administrators to easily update and maintain records through a secure admin panel.

Nowadays, institutions require fast and reliable communication. The proposed system ensures that students and parents can access important information such as notices, updates, and events anytime and from anywhere. It eliminates the need for physical presence and reduces dependency on manual processes.

The reason behind developing this system is that there is a large amount of information to be handled and maintained regularly. The existing system is partially computerized and requires repetitive data entry, which increases workload and chances of errors.
To overcome these issues, the proposed system provides features such as:
The system is designed to be
, helping the institution to manage its operations smoothly and effectively while saving time and resources.
Minimum 4 GB (8 GB recommended for better performance)
Primary email used for login credentials.
Full name of the administrative user.
Unique identifier for the staff member.
URL of the staff profile image.
Display order in the staff directory.
Unique ID for each notice board entry.
Detailed text body of the notice.
Full name of the person making the enquiry.
Full name of the student candidate.
Name of the last school attended.
Unique ID for the image asset.
Sequence for display on the webpage.
Brief overview of the committee's role.
Links member to the Master Committee table.
Unique ID for each logged administrative action.
Type of operation performed (Add / Edit / Delete).
Category of item modified (e.g., Staff, Admission).
Human-readable name of the specific item modified.
Identifier of the Admin who performed the action.
The exact date and time the action occurred.
Reports are an essential part of the
Vasundhara Academy Institutional Portal & Administrative System

as they provide meaningful information about various activities of the system. These reports help the admin monitor operations, analyze performance, and make better institutional decisions. The system generates different reports in a structured and understandable format.
Provides information about all registered teaching and non-teaching staff members.
Includes staff ID, name, designation, qualification, and category.
Helps maintain staff records and supports department management.
Useful for communication, compliance, and faculty information tracking.
Contains details of all student admission applications.
Includes application ID, student details, target grade, and status.
Helps track admissions, manage intake, and analyze enrollment trends.
Stores information about parent enquiries and messages.
Includes enquiry details, subject, and communication status.
Helps track interactions and improve response management.
Maintains records of notices and announcements published in the system.
Includes notice title, category, priority, and active status.
Helps manage official communications and ensures transparency.
Provides records of system activities and modifications.
Includes actions performed, entity details, and timestamps.
Helps maintain accountability, security, and audit tracking.
Provides an overall overview of institutional performance.
Shows total staff, admissions, enquiries, and pending tasks.
Supports quick decision-making and management reporting.
works properly across different browsers, operating systems, and hardware platforms.
In the Vasundhara Academy project, the website is tested on multiple browsers such as:
Compatibility is also verified across different operating systems like:
This testing is performed manually using cross-device responsive testing tools to ensure that the
appears consistent and perfect on all screen sizes.
Functional testing ensures that all features and functionalities of the
Testing secure login for school administrators.
Creating and categorizing teaching and support staff by the Admin.
Submitting student enquiry forms by parents and reviewing them by the Admin.
Uploading gallery photos and academic documents.
Publishing and managing the marquee notification banner.
Testing is performed by providing different types of inputs (valid and invalid) and verifying whether the output matches the expected results in both the database and the user interface.
White box testing is a testing approach where the internal code structure of the
The tester has access to the Next.js source code and Prisma schema.
Internal logic, API routes, and database query conditions are verified.
Security vulnerabilities (such as unprotected admin routes) are identified.
This testing is mainly performed during the unit testing phase. Key steps include:
Analyzing the Prisma schema to ensure correct table relationships.
Designing test cases based on Next.js API route logic.
Testing for security flaws in the NextAuth middleware.
Ensuring all server-side functions handle errors properly without crashing.
Black box testing focuses on verifying system functionality without knowledge of its internal code.
Inputs are provided to admission and enquiry forms.
Outputs are checked against expected website behavior.
Internal implementation is not considered by the tester.
Checking layout consistency and premium animations.
Ensuring phone numbers and email formats are correct.
Verifying that changing an admission status updates correctly on the dashboard.
Ensuring the system clearly displays "Success" or "Failure" messages.
Boundary values (e.g., testing very long student names)
The proposed system provides several benefits to the institution in terms of administration, communication, performance, and scalability.
All records such as staff, admissions, and committees are managed in one database.
Admin can update notices, staff details, and gallery content instantly.
System records admin actions for accountability and security.
Important announcements can be displayed immediately on the homepage.
Parents can submit enquiries anytime through the website.
School events and facilities can be displayed clearly to build trust.
Website can be easily found through search engines.
Optimized media delivery improves browsing experience.
Ensures accurate and secure data storage.
Cloud-based deployment reduces hardware and maintenance expenses.
New modules can be added easily in future.
The proposed system improves efficiency, communication, security, and performance while being cost-effective and scalable for future growth.
While the system is highly advanced, it currently has certain limitations that reflect its first-phase development.

Since the application is hosted on cloud infrastructure (Vercel and Neon), the administrative dashboard requires a stable internet connection to perform data updates or media uploads. Without an internet connection, the system cannot be accessed or modified.
The current version supports only a
role. It does not yet differentiate between different staff roles such as:
Transitioning many years of physical school records into the digital database requires a one-time manual data entry process. This can be time-consuming during the initial setup phase.
The application currently does not support offline viewing or data caching through
. As a result, the system cannot be used in areas with no network connectivity.
To further improve the functionality, usability, and scalability of the system, the following enhancements are proposed:
Implement Progressive Web App (PWA) features using Service Workers to enable offline access, data caching, and basic functionality even without an internet connection.
Add a visual dashboard with charts and reports to analyze admissions data, student trends, and staff performance for better decision-making.
Integrate a secure online payment gateway to allow parents to pay school fees digitally, reducing manual
Enhance communication by integrating SMS and email services to send automated alerts for admissions, notices, and important announcements.
Allow parents to upload student documents (e.g., Aadhaar, previous mark sheets) during admission and enable admin-side verification.
Create an Android/iOS mobile app for easier access to school information, notifications, and services.
Implement features such as Two-Factor Authentication (2FA), CAPTCHA, and advanced encryption to further secure user data.
Introduce automatic database backup and recovery mechanisms to prevent data loss and ensure reliability.
successfully demonstrates how modern web technologies can be used to digitalize and streamline school operations efficiently.
for managing staff, admissions, notices, and media, reducing dependency on manual and paper-based processes.
between the school administration and parents through real-time updates and notifications.
● The use of advanced technologies such as Next.js, Prisma, and cloud-based deployment ensures
● The application is designed with a
, making it easy for non-technical users to operate the system effectively.
● Strong security practices, including authentication and data validation, help in maintaining
● Although the system has certain limitations in its current phase, the proposed enhancements provide a clear roadmap for future improvements and expansion.
● Overall, the project serves as a
for modern school management and lays a strong foundation for future digital transformation.

Prisma ORM Reference: Database toolkit for TypeScript & Node.js
PostgreSQL Official Manual: The World's Most Advanced Open Source Relational Database
Cloudinary Media Management: Image and Video API for Developers
Software Engineering: A Practitioner's Approach (8th Edition)
Learning React: Functional Web Development with React and Redux
– Alex Banks & Eve Porcello, O’Reilly Media
– Abraham Silberschatz, Henry F. Korth, S. Sudarshan, McGraw-Hill
Vercel Deployment Guide: Hosting and Continuous Deployment
MDN Web Docs: Comprehensive Web Technologies Resource
Neon Database Documentation: Serverless Postgres and Autoscaling
